What to do if you are sick with 2019 Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCoV)
Recently Returned Travelers from China

If you were in China in the last 14 days and feel sick with fever, cough, or difficulty breathing, you should:

Seek medical care right away. Before you go to a doctor’s office or emergency room, call ahead and tell them about your recent travel and your symptoms.
Avoid contact with others.
Not travel while sick.
Cover your mouth and nose with a tissue or your sleeve (not your hands) when coughing or sneezing.
Wash hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds to avoid spreading the virus to others. Use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer that contains at least 60% alcohol if soap and water are not available.

因為US冇疫情爆發，而且有多種措施控制疫情，所以暫時睇唔到爆發嘅可能性。如果CDC而家已經叫人戴口罩，好多美國人聽日就開始買同戴口罩，將來假如真係爆發，到時就冇晒口罩用。

同埋CDC呼籲病就stay home，唔好同人有close contact，自我隔離一定有效過出街戴口罩。人地基本條件係可以做到，因為人口冇咁稠密、二來由日用品到外賣都可以完全唔經人同人接觸，而且好多選擇、三來home office嘅文化本身都流行。

quote.msg:
What to do if you are sick with 2019 Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCoV)
Recently Returned Travelers from China

If you were in China in the last 14 days and feel sick with fever, cough, or difficulty breathing, you should:

Seek medical care right away. Before you go to a doctor’s office or emergency room, call ahead and tell them about your recent travel and your symptoms.
Avoid contact with others.
Not travel while sick.
Cover your mouth and nose with a tissue or your sleeve (not your hands) when coughing or sneezing.
Wash hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds to avoid spreading the virus to others. Use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer that contains at least 60% alcohol if soap and water are not available.

因為US冇疫情爆發，而且有多種措施控制疫情，所以暫時睇唔到爆發嘅可能性。如果CDC而家已經叫人戴口罩，好多美國人聽日就開始買同戴口罩，將來假如真係爆發，到時就冇晒口罩用。

同埋CDC呼籲病就stay home，唔好同人有close contact，自我隔離一定有效過出街戴口罩。人地基本條件係可以做到，因為人口冇咁稠密、二來由日用品到外賣都可以完全唔經人同人接觸，而且好多選擇、三來home office嘅文化本身都流行。

反觀香港，以上條件皆無，居住空間又窄，就算俾你防疫休假都好，都好難連續好多日唔出街（除非爆到武漢咁）。因為明知啲人會出街，所以唯有叫人戴口罩，叫做有個好過冇嘅保障。
